sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 89:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 89:1
items.html: Holam means that the dot, which is the bottom Hey, is above the letters YHV. Then they are considered AHP that come out to the phase of Guf, meaning HGT. The dot of Kamatz means that the bottom Hey descended from the Nikvey Einayim, and came to her place under the letters YHV. At that time, the YHV return to the Rosh and become HBD. (Inner Observation, Item 11)
